textByHash.14fe5764fd0b85a380171e1a206d2697f7e645e2: Hello there, I'm Captain Bruce. Do you want to serve in the Shayzien Army and defend our kingdom?
textByHash.3bbb05b6a1741c2f7a71c20c0cbf91c17f5f5896: Wonderful! To get started, you need to answer a few questions.
textByHash.bcc6bf4a25a826962a930de68564edffccdd5370: Are you a resident of Kourend?
textByHash.871fc9a95b41ab13596a2eee4bc404d6cd8c2efa: Ah. Then you cannot join I'm afraid.
textByHash.88cb14596ba954070754e8f9905b6915b0dedc8a: It's in the rules I'm afraid. Only citizens of Kourend are allowed to join the Shayzien Army.
textByHash.e9087403516c93fba79e6eb4c4e8907119f3cf5a: Well at one time only citizens of Shayzien could join the army. It wasn't until the reign of King Byrne I that people from other parts of the kingdom were allowed to enlist.
textByHash.2cf24141a004f27e50ae9c9b98e12117d50c8727: Of course, many people in Kourend still like to stick to tradition. After all, the five cities of Kourend have always had very defined roles within the kingdom.
textByHash.ed48af21ebb663712e6d187c797626ea70ebf97c: Indeed. While the Shayzien Army is by far the largest military force in Kourend, the other cities still have some form of militia, apart from Arceuus of course.
textByHash.15aa0850fb98a73ddc828529904cb24ee1445857: Even if someone from elsewhere in the kingdom wants to become a soldier, they're far more likely to join their local city force than come to us.
textByHash.122c75eb97fbfeae80a20dee76038c1cfe7f48ab: Still, times are slowly changing. Every year we see more people from outside Shayzien enlist.
textByHash.bd396360241d9441a3eb9e063bdca006b93a66c2: That's alright. Come back if you change your mind.
textByHash.b96217e59d82230d25ebf613d7d015d01bd77452: That doesn't look solved to me.
